sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Mitkhua mulo mittaw pi'n
Lam napai napai den leh
Sihna guam thuk sung
Na kiat ding lau huai sa'ng
Tua guamthuk sung na kiat ma'n
Na mit mah mah Doctor Zeisu lawngsak in
Tua hi leh na mit hong kihong ding a
Lam man na zui ding hi

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Pulpi za vat mittaw khelbai bang ngong mi
Leitung pilna tawh nabawl hang dam ken cia
Bethsida hong ki lok nawn lo ding a
Na natna mun telin Zeisu lawng sak in

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Khasiangtho vabang len na
Leitung mit in muban lo
Pasian pilna leitung pilna'n ban zo lo
Ngaih sutna tawh napuk ma'n
Na khuak mahmah Doctor Zeisu lawngsak in
Tua hi leh nalungtang ki hong ding a
thuman na tel ding hi

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Khasiangtho huhna meibang
A tanlai na mitsak ke'n
Khebai pi ih vangam ah na tun sawm ke'n
Tuanglam bang pial khe ni teh
Na khe mamah Doctor Zeisu lawngsak in
Tua hi leh na lungtang ki hong ding a
Thuman na tel ding hi
